prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLE-CLASSICGOBLETGLASS-BLU-10PK-BUN Product Type: DRINKING_CUP Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Set of 10 Capri Blue Classic Goblet Water Glasses Home Decor Glassware, 7.43oz Description: Featuring a simple, classic and timeless design, these goblet water glasses from Beille are elegant enough to sit next to wine glasses or other cocktail glasses for a formal table setting, yet durable and casual enough to endure everyday use, whether for orange juice at breakfast or a refreshing glass of your favorite sparkling water on a hot summer afternoon.

Not too big and not too small, these perfectly sized water glasses or goblet glasses hold 7.43 fluid ounces or 20ML. Whether for wine, juice, lemonade, iced tea, water and more, these water glasses can do it all with style.

Exuding a casual, yet classic and stylish design, these stemmed or footed water glasses are well balanced, feature a rolled rim and are made from durable and quality glass materials. And, they’re conveniently dishwasher safe; place water glasses or wine glasses on the top rack for easy and quick kitchen clean up.

These classic stemmed water glasses or wine glasses from Beille will make a stylish addition to any kitchen with their no fuss, timeless design and durable glass construction. You’ll reach for these water glasses for all sorts of different occasions, and perhaps even for a dessert recipe like chocolate mousse or a mini berry trifle. Enjoy!

Individual Water Glass Dimensions: 6.25 x 3.25 x 3.25 inches

Individual Water Glass Weight: 0.54lbs

Sold as a set of 4, 6, 10 or 12. Search Terms: Home goods glassware cocktail goblet champagne wine glasses drinkware set table décor restaurant supplies tabletop housewarming gifts for new house wedding gifts stemware wedding registry ideas bar cart orange juice lemonade water glasses set of 4 6 10 12 Features: - CLASSIC WATER GLASSES: Featuring a simple and timeless design, these goblet water glasses from Beille are elegant enough to complement wine or other cocktail glasses for a more formal table setting, but absolutely durable enough for everyday use - PERFECTLY SIZED: Not too big, not too small, these perfectly sized water glasses hold 7.43oz; whether for wine, orange juice, lemonade, iced tea, water and more, these water glasses can do it all with style - DURABLE GOBLET GLASSES: Exuding a casual yet classic and stylish design, these footed goblet glasses are well balanced, feature a rolled rim and are made from durable and quality glass materials - DISHWASHER SAFE: Conveniently dishwasher safe, place water glasses or wine glasses on the top rack for an easy and quick kitchen clean up - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 6.25 x 3.25 x 3 inches; Individual Glass Weight: 0.54lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 10-pk Capri Blue Classic Goblet Water Glasses

openai.item_name: Beille 10-pk 7.43oz Capri Blue Classic Goblet Glasses

anthropic.title_differentiation: Set Of 10, 743Oz, Dishwasher Safe, Elegant Stemmed Design, Durable Glass, Perfect For Water Wine And Cocktails

openai.title_differentiation: Dishwasher Safe, Rolled Rim, Footed Balance, Durable Glass, Formal And Everyday Use, 10-Piece Set
